business_definition: A normalized operational cash movement or cash activity event for an account/entity.

fields.entity_id: The legal or operating entity associated with the activity.
fields.account_id: The account against which the activity occurred.
fields.transaction_id: The source or normalized transaction identifier.
fields.transaction_type: The normalized transaction category or activity type.
fields.transaction_status: The normalized status of the activity record.
fields.amount: The normalized cash amount for the event.
fields.effective_date: The business-effective date of the activity.
fields.debit_credit_indicator: Indicates whether the activity is a debit or credit where available.
